  • Classes in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz.spi used by edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz
    Class
    Description
    ArgumentsGenerator
    Turns one input into the arguments for a single trial.
    ResultClassifier
    Classifies a throwable raised by a trial into an engine-level outcome.
    TrialExecutor
    Runs a single trial of a test method with generated arguments.

    Class
    Description
    TrialExecutor
    Runs a single trial of a test method with generated arguments.
